# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  VPCNetwork:
    type: google.vpc.core.VPCNetwork
    properties:
      name: network-3-tier-app
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  Subnet1:
    type: google.compute.Subnetwork
    properties:
      name: subnet-frontend
      ipCidrRange: { getIPRange: VPCNetwork, rangeName: '10.0.0.0/16' }
      region: us-central1
      network: { get: VPCNetwork }

  Subnet2:
    type: google.compute.Subnetwork
    properties:
      name: subnet-appserver
      ipCidrRange: { getIPRange: VPCNetwork, rangeName: '10.0.1.0/16' }
      region: us-central1
      network: { get: VPCNetwork }

  Subnet3:
    type: google.compute.Subnetwork
    properties:
      name: subnet-dbserver
      ipCidrRange: { getIPRange: VPCNetwork, rangeName: '10.0.2.0/16' }
      region: us-central1
      network: { get: VPCNetwork }
